board_csa_architect.notes: Schema is sound. api_agent_keys as a separate table from api_keys correctly enforces auth plane separation. RLS policy design mirrors the L6-33 pattern cleanly. SET LOCAL is the correct Postgres primitive for session-scoped variables. Approved.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Anti-spoofing contract is correctly specified: role resolved from DB only, never from headers. Separation of api_agent_keys from api_keys prevents privilege escalation via token reuse across auth planes. Anti-AC-1 and Anti-AC-3 explicitly block the two highest-risk attack vectors. Approved with condition: SHA-256 HMAC must use a server-side secret, not a bare hash — must be captured in implementation.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Zero VRAM impact — pure backend infrastructure change. No LLM calls in middleware path. The queryAsAdmin call in agentPrivilegeGate is a single indexed lookup (idx_api_agent_keys_hash) — latency negligible. Pattern mirrors privilegeGate correctly. Approved.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Deployment is additive: new table, new middleware, new RLS. No breaking changes to existing routes. Key revocation endpoint (DELETE) enables incident response without service restart. Index on key_hash ensures the lookup stays sub-millisecond at scale. Approved.

board_red_team.notes: STRIDE: Spoofing=mitigated (server-side role resolution). Tampering=mitigated (RLS enforced at DB layer). Repudiation=GAP(no audit log on agentPrivilegeGate calls). Info Disclosure=mitigated (worker isolation). DoS=RISK(key lookup per request — rate-limit needed). Elevation=RISK(if api_agent_keys INSERT has lax RLS, anyone could register a sentinel key). Failure scenarios: (1) attacker creates api_agent_keys row directly via app_client role if INSERT policy missing; (2) SET LOCAL silently fails in non-transactional context and middleware passes through with empty role; (3) department=NULL in tasks table matches all specialist queries. Conditions: add INSERT RLS to api_agent_keys; add audit log call in middleware; document SET LOCAL transaction requirement; add NULL guard on department column.
